'''ngarapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whanger|whanger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whanger|whanger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngarapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæræpæth|ngæræpæth]] || [[word:ngæræpæj|ngæræpæj]] || [[word:ngæræpæsh|ngæræpæsh]] || [[word:ngæræpæ|ngæræpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngararapath|ngararapath]] || [[word:ngararapaj|ngararapaj]] || [[word:ngararapash|ngararapash]] || [[word:ngararapa|ngararapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngarapath|ngarapath]] || [[word:ngarapaj|ngarapaj]] || [[word:ngarapash|ngarapash]] || [[word:ngarapa|ngarapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarafpath|ngarafpath]] || [[word:ngarafpaj|ngarafpaj]] || [[word:ngarafpash|ngarafpash]] || [[word:ngarafpaf|ngarafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngarapatha|ngarapatha]] || [[word:ngarapaja|ngarapaja]] || [[word:ngarapasha|ngarapasha]] || [[word:ngarapaka|ngarapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngarapath|ngarapath]] || [[word:ngarapaj|ngarapaj]] || [[word:ngarapash|ngarapash]] || [[word:ngarapa|ngarapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngarapathal|ngarapathal]] || [[word:ngarapajal|ngarapajal]] || [[word:ngarapashal|ngarapashal]] || [[word:ngarapakal|ngarapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngarapathatha|ngarapathatha]] || [[word:ngarapajaja|ngarapajaja]] || [[word:ngarapashasha|ngarapashasha]] || [[word:ngarapaka|ngarapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngarapathan|ngarapathan]] || [[word:ngarapajan|ngarapajan]] || [[word:ngarapashan|ngarapashan]] || [[word:ngarapakan|ngarapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngarapathaoro|ngarapathaoro]] || [[word:ngarapajaoro|ngarapajaoro]] || [[word:ngarapashaoro|ngarapashaoro]] || [[word:ngarapakaoro|ngarapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
